name: aidd-framework
description: Official plugin marketplace for the AI-Driven Development framework

plugins.name: aidd-context
plugins.description: Knowledge production: project bootstrap, project init, generation of context artifacts (skills, agents, rules, commands, hooks), mermaid diagrams, learn, discovery

plugins.name: aidd-dev
plugins.description: Code transformation: Dev SDLC orchestrator (code-shipping pipeline), plan, assert, audit, review, test, refactor, debug, for-sure. Hosts engineering agents.

plugins.name: aidd-vcs
plugins.description: External artifacts: commit, pull-request, release-tag, issue-create

plugins.name: aidd-pm
plugins.description: Product management: ticket-info, user-stories-create, prd, spec

plugins.name: aidd-orchestrator
plugins.description: Async development orchestration: turn ready issues into pull requests, then iterate on review feedback until a human takes over.

plugins.name: aidd-refine
plugins.description: Meta-cognition: refine input through brainstorming, refine output through challenge and condensed communication mode.

plugins.name: aidd-ui
plugins.description: ALPHA, not ready for use. UI and UX concern: a top-to-bottom recipe (product, wireframe, design-system, build, review, polish) to generate a high-quality frontend.
